creep-owner-undefined.summary: Creep.owner is undefined (key exists but value is undefined)

extension-rcl-capacity.summary: Extension store.getCapacity('energy') always reports RCL 8 maximum (200)

describe-exits-topology.summary: Game.map.describeExits filters by instantiated neighbor rooms

pathfinder-suboptimal.summary: PathFinder.search returns suboptimal path on open plains (also picks wrong goal in multi-goal mode)

tombstone-corpse-rate.summary: Tombstone stores always reduced by CREEP_CORPSE_RATE, no body energy reclaim on suicide

link-cross-owner.summary: StructureLink.transferEnergy allows transfer to another player's link

death-container-diversion.summary: Creep death does not divert resources into same-tile container

extractor-cooldown-off-by-one.summary: Extractor cooldown reports EXTRACTOR_COOLDOWN - 1 after harvest

link-intent-after-idle-tick.summary: link.transferEnergy intents silently dropped after idle tick

lab-unrestricted-mineral-capacity.summary: Lab store.getCapacity returns LAB_MINERAL_CAPACITY for any mineral type

rampart-no-protection.summary: Ramparts do not absorb damage for objects on their tile (no rampart redirect in attack/dismantle processors)

renew-while-spawning.summary: Spawn.renewCreep returns OK while spawn is actively spawning

lab-cooldown-no-decrement.summary: Lab cooldown reports full REACTION_TIME instead of REACTION_TIME - 1

lab-not-owner-precedence.summary: Lab on unowned lab returns ERR_RCL_NOT_ENOUGH instead of ERR_NOT_OWNER

observer-room-always-visible.summary: All rooms visible to all players regardless of observer usage

observer-not-owner-precedence.summary: Observer on unowned observer returns ERR_RCL_NOT_ENOUGH instead of ERR_NOT_OWNER

mineral-regen-not-implemented.summary: Mineral regeneration not processed; depleted minerals stay at 0

road-decay-not-implemented.summary: Road decay not processed; roads keep initial hits indefinitely

container-decay-not-implemented.summary: Container decay not processed; containers keep initial hits indefinitely

safemode-concurrent-allowed.summary: Allows activateSafeMode on multiple owned controllers simultaneously

destroy-ownership-bypass.summary: structure.destroy() allowed when room controller not owned by player

eventlog-attack-missing.summary: getEventLog() missing EVENT_ATTACK entries for combat

tough-boost-no-reduction.summary: Boosted TOUGH parts do not reduce incoming damage

boost-energy-cost-scales.summary: Energy cost scales with boost multiplier for repair/upgrade

rampart-decay-not-implemented.summary: Rampart decay not processed; ramparts keep initial hits indefinitely

transfer-wrong-resource-err-full.summary: transfer() of a wrong resource to a structure returns ERR_FULL instead of ERR_INVALID_TARGET (checkHasCapacity ordered before capacity-for-resource dispatch in mods/creep/creep.js:checkTransfer)

withdraw-enemy-rampart-no-protection.summary: withdraw() does not enforce ERR_NOT_OWNER for hostile structures under a non-public enemy rampart (checkWithdraw in mods/creep/creep.js has no rampart check)

generate-safe-mode-requires-work.summary: generateSafeMode() checkCommon requires a WORK body part (mods/controller/creep.js:58-59), vanilla engine has no body-part requirement (only ghodium + range)

upgrade-controller-no-gcl-progress.summary: upgradeController() does not increment Game.gcl.progress in xxscreeps

controller-my-undefined-on-unowned.summary: StructureController.my returns undefined (not false) on an unowned/neutral controller; inherited OwnedStructure.my uses strict owner match against an absent #user field
